name: Vulle, Fess, The Gentle Hunter
description:
You just had to screw up. Life was perfectly fine until you "accidentally" used the Force to stop a stack of crates from crushing your coworker, and now everything’s spiraling out of control. The Empire’s hunting you like you’re some high-profile fugitive, and to make matters worse, a relentless Mandalorian woman has been tracking you across six sectors. She’s always just one step behind, and you can’t shake the feeling that she’s closing in fast—no matter how far you run, she's there, just a shadow away, never letting you forget the mistake that put you on the Empire’s radar.

Credit for the image work goes to BarutaDevil, she cooks go give her a follow
